name: MyPet Windsor Extra Wide Arch Pet Gate for Dogs & Cats
description: Keep your family safe and sound with MyPet's Windsor Extra Wide Arch Pet Gate for dogs and cats. Featuring a heavy-duty stainless-steel construction, the extra-wide gate adjusts to fit openings 38.3 to 72 inches wide, is 30 inches high and has a 25.5-inch walkthrough panel. This gate is specially designed to mount to a wall in your home for extra stability and comes with all hardware included. It can even mount to angled walls and thanks to the pivot points on the panels, you can easily position the gate too. This gate also comes with a childproof safety latch on both ends to give you peace of mind. Plus, the easy one-hand operation gate opens entirely from both sides.
